rules.name: Legal Entity Suffixes
rules.description: Matches common German legal entity suffixes like GmbH, AG, KG, e.V., and their variations (e.g., & Co. KG).

rules.name: Court and Authority Names
rules.description: Matches specific court names and government authorities ending in Gericht, Gerichtshof, Amt, Behörde, or specific known names like Bundesverfassungsgericht.
rules.content: \b(?:Bundes(?:verfassungsgericht|verwaltungsgericht|finanzhof|patentgericht|gerichtshof)|Landes(?:gericht|gerichtshof)|Oberlandesgericht|Amtsgericht|Verwaltungsgericht|Finanzamt|Markenstelle|Deutsches Patent- und Markenamt|Europäischer Gerichtshof für Menschenrechte|Bundesnachrichtendienst|Auswärtiges Amt|Bundesministerium|Landessozialgericht|Sozialgericht|Anwaltsgerichtshof|Flüchtlingsrat|Rentenversicherung|Bundesrechtsanwaltskammer|Medizinischer Dienst der Krankenversicherung|BA|BSG|EuGH|BFH|DPMA|BVerfG|GmSOGB|ZDS|VCS|MDK)\b

rules.name: Organization with Location/Type
rules.description: Matches organizations that include a location or specific type descriptor, such as 'Schulzentrum für Technik' or 'Senat des ...'.

rules.name: Brand and Trade Names
rules.description: Matches capitalized brand names or trade names that appear as standalone entities, often in quotes or followed by 'Marke'.

rules.name: Abbreviated Entities
rules.description: Matches short abbreviations (2-4 chars) that are known organizations, ensuring they are not part of a word.

rules.name: Quoted Organization Names
rules.description: Matches organization names enclosed in German quotation marks, but only when preceded by context indicating an organization (e.g., 'Firma', 'Marke', 'Name', 'der', 'des') to avoid matching product names or streets.

rules.description: Matches generic organization patterns like 'Firma X GmbH', 'Senat des Y', 'Bundesministerium', 'Landesamt', etc., using structural patterns to generalize.

rules.name: Specific Court Departments and Senates
rules.description: Matches specific German court names and abbreviations that were previously in the long list, now using a more structured approach for common courts and abbreviations.

rules.name: Court with Location Genitive
rules.description: Matches court names in genitive case (e.g., 'des Landgerichts') but extracts only the court name, handling compound state names correctly (e.g., 'Sachsen-Anhalt', 'Nordrhein-Westfalen').

rules.name: Organization with Location/Type
rules.description: Matches organizations with specific descriptors like 'Schulzentrum für Technik' or 'Senat des ...', ensuring full capture.

rules.name: Quoted Organization Names
rules.description: Matches organization names enclosed in German quotation marks, but only when preceded by context indicating an organization (e.g., 'Firma', 'Marke', 'Name', 'der', 'des') to avoid matching product names or streets.
